Vocabulary - मन्दस्मितता कुतः न ? | Story 16

08 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
एषः this
व्यय cost
चेद् if
तथैव in the same manner / similarly
नितराम् by all means / always
आरब्ध begun
खेदित disturbed
भाति appear as
एकैक one by one
प्रतिमाया counter-spell

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
एषा मम सखी This is my friend (fem.).
एषा मम आनुजा She’s my little sister.
एषः मम आदेशः This is my advice.
   
तथैव अस्तु Let it be so / so be it.
तथैव इति न नियमः It is not like that.
यत् अहं दृष्टवती तथैव अहं वदिष्यामि Let me describe what exactly I saw.
   
भवतः शाला कदा आरब्धा? When did your school begin?
किमर्थं इदानीं अपि कार्यं न आरब्धम्? Why hasn’t the work begun?
   
सः वृद्धः इव भाति He looks aged.
सा सन्तुष्टा इति भाति She looks so happy.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
